mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER
USER_ID LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RNUM, A.* FROM ( SELECT USER_NO as userNo, USER_ID as userId, USER_NAME as userName, USER_ADDRESS as userAddress, USER_PHONE as userPhone, USER_ENROLL_DATE as userEnrollDate FROM MEMBER
USER_ID LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
ORDER BY USER_NO DESC ) A ) WHERE RNUM BETWEEN #{offset} AND #{limit}

SELECT USER_NO as userNo, USER_ID as userId, USER_NAME as userName, USER_ADDRESS as userAddress, USER_PHONE as userPhone, USER_EMAIL as userEmail, USER_ENROLL_DATE as userEnrollDate FROM MEMBER WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo}

SELECT ITEM_NO as itemNo, ITEM_TITLE as itemTitle, START_PRICE as startPrice, CURRENT_PRICE as currentPrice, CREATE_AT as createAt, STATUS as status FROM ITEM WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} ORDER BY CREATE_AT DESC
SELECT BOARD_NO as boardNo, BOARD_TITLE as boardTitle, BOARD_DATE as boardDate, VIEW_COUNT as views, BOARD_DELETE as boardDelete FROM BOARD_POST WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} ORDER BY BOARD_NO DESC
